title: Physics Fundamentals: Mechanics
description:
This course approaches the study of the physical universe by analysing objects in motion. All the physical magnitudes and laws that allow us to describe geometrically and causally the motion of bodies represented by a point are defined and analysed. 
 We will examine: 
 
 Physical quantities and vector algebra 
 Fundamentals of point kinematics 
 Types of motion 
 Dynamics of a point 
 Work and power 
 Mechanical energy
